comment: Brain-dependent questions. Each is answerable from a well-maintained WORKSPACE_BRAIN.md but should be unanswerable (or hand-waved) without it. The harness sends each question to Claude with and without the brain in the system prompt, then judges both answers blind.

questions.prompt: What is the single highest-priority thing the team is working on this week, and what's the deadline (if any)?
What is the most recent technical or product decision made on this project, and why was it made?
What in-flight work is currently blocked? What is it blocked on?
Name one specific open question that the team still needs to resolve. Be concrete.
Name one non-obvious cross-reference or dependency in this codebase — something that would catch out a new contributor.
